titleStmt.title: SII 34.209: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 209. Satyamangalam, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west and south bases of the Chōḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: A temple girl called Tāyagam Maṟakkavoṇṇātār of Veḷḷai-nallūr in Chiṟuvāy-nāḍu was permitted to enjoy some temple land as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna with the condition that she should contribute to the temple a stipulated quantity of paddy as fixed by the temple trustees. It is said that she got the right from purchase of the land from an earlier holder of the said land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇṭu 10 3 vatu tai mātam teṉ ciṟuvāyiṉāṭṭu veḷḷai nallūruṭai muṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyil tēvaraṭiyāril tāyakam maṟakkavoṇṇātārkku kuṭi nīṅkāt tēvatāṉam piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu perumpuñcai Uṭaiyār tiruperumāḷ nāyiṉār tēvatāṉamāṉa vīrapattiraṉ kuṭikkāṭṭu cākka
vayakkalum kiṇaṟum kalamati kalpakkālum Ēttum Ēttakkālum Itu cūḻnta maraṅkaḷum mōluḷḷa kuḷa panāṉa muṭikoṇṭa cōḻanāṭāḻvāṉ pakka vilai koṇṭuṭaiya cunti vayakkalukku vilai niṟceyittu kuṭutta Orumā- 8 10 Ippaṇam Eṇpatukkum vōlai Eḻuti tanta cātaṉappaṭiyē maṟakka Oṇṇātār Āḷakkaṭavārākavum Āḷum Iṭattu varicai tēvakaṉmi kōyiṟ kaṇakkar payar pātta nilattukku vīra parikalaṉ kālāl
māttāl Aṟukalanellum Āṭikkuṟuvai Araivaricaiyum Aṟpaci kuṟuvai mukkāl varicaiyu māttāl Antarāya mūṉṟu paṇamum tāṅ koṇṭu Iṟukkavum Ippaṭikku kalveṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ maṟakka Oṇṇātāṟku kāṅkayaṉē Ippaṭikku kāṅkayaṉ Eḻuttu muṭikoṇṭa cōḻa nāṭāḻvā taṟkuṟiku Aḻakiya cōḻavēḷ Eḻuttu mīṉavaṉ muttaraiyar taṟkuṟi Aruntavaṉ virupparaiya Eḻuttu Aḻakiyacōḻa nāṭāḻvār
ku(pa) Ōmaḻakiya paṭṭar taṟkkuṟi tēvāṉai Eḻuttu muṭipēraiyaṉ Eḻuttu muṭikoṇṭa koṇṭa kollaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cāttan Āṉaiyar Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
